hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; f=json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if f.endswith('.py') else 1)" 2>/dev/null; then python3 -m py_compile $(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))") && echo "syntax ok" || echo "SYNTAX ERROR — fix before proceeding"; fi
